description_long: This object is a pair of pliers with a sleek, elongated form and a dark, metallic finish. The handles are straight and taper gently towards the ends, providing a comfortable grip for manual operation. The jaws are robust and slightly curved, designed to grip, twist, or pull objects with precision. A central pivot joint connects the two arms, allowing the jaws to open and close smoothly. The surface appears hard and glossy, reflecting light, and the overall construction suggests durability and strength. No visible branding or logo is present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sleek, dark metallic pair of pliers with straight handles and slightly curved jaws, featuring a central pivot joint and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pliers, highlighting the straight handles and the central pivot joint.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open jaws and the symmetrical curvature of the handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the elongated handles and the robust jaw structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open jaws and the inner gripping surfaces, with the handles curving outward.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, elongated metal handles with a slight taper; no visible insulation or ergonomic features.
attribute_jaw_design: Slightly curved, robust jaws with a smooth gripping surface; no serrations or wire cutter features visible.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed central pivot joint allowing standard opening and closing motion; no adjustable or slip-joint mechanism.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth metal surface with no visible texturing or pattern on the handles.
